title: Damage Tracker
description: This is a simple Fabric mod, that allows you to see your own health changes in the action bar.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Mod Description**

**Damage Tracker** is a client-sided Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that allows players to view their health changes in the action bar (text element above the hot bar). For example, if you take damage because of falling, an action bar title will appear, containing the amount of damage you just took, and the source of the damage (in this case: "fall"). If you regain health, an action bar message will appear, showing you how much health you just gained. If you **block with a shield** that is either in your **main-hand**, or in your **off-hand**, an action bar message will appear, showing _estimated_ damage blocked from attacks (NOTE: If your shield has the **!damage** component, the action bar message will not appear; and if your shield is enchanted with **unbreaking**, the estimated amount of damage blocked will be _more_ rough). The whole mod is toggleable with this command that the mod adds: **/toggledmgdisplay**.

For a visual of the mod, please check out this mod's screenshots in the **[Gallery Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/damage-tracker/gallery)**.

<hr>

**Donation**

If you like my work, and would support me, then please consider to donate **[here](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/EdwardKhrabrov)** (or with another link on the side bar, under "**Links**").
